[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0011101010 5
1 0111111101 8
2 1011111010 7
3 0111011101 7
4 1111111010 8
5 1110011101 7
6 0101101011 6
7 1111111101 9

45 54 0111011111 8
56 65 1111011111 9
67 76 1111111111 a
70 07 0111111011 8

24 42 0111011101 7 match 3

46 64 1110011101 7 match 5
57 75 0101101011 6 match 6
60 06 1111111101 9 match 7
71 17 0111101011 7
